description: Router scans index.json with routing_mode=prefer-with-fallback. Finds stale-pool listed as idle but last_active_at is 25 days ago — stale.
assertion: routing_mode is prefer-with-fallback; stale-pool is the only pool; last_active_at is 25 days ago

description: FR-MMT22 Condition 2 fires and cleanup runs. stale-pool removed from index. Warning shown once.
assertion: stale-pool cleaned up; warning shown; index now empty

description: After cleanup, no matching pool remains. routing_mode=prefer-with-fallback: falls back silently with no error shown.
assertion: routing_decision is fell-back-no-pool; silent is true; error_shown is false (prefer-with-fallback does not abort)

description: Command proceeds by spawning a fresh review team as the fallback path.
assertion: result is fresh_spawn_started; command completed without error
